questions.question: Write a Java program in a class called Hello to display the message Good morning.
Write a Java program in a class called Student to display a student name, class, and age on three separate lines.
Write a Java program to declare an int variable num with value 25 and print it.
Write a Java program to declare a short variable students with value 100 and print it.
Write a Java program to declare a double variable price with value 45.75 and print it.
Write a Java program to declare a String variable schoolName with value Sishya and print it.
Write a Java program to print Hello and Welcome on two separate lines.
Write a Java program to print two words on the same line using print().
Write a Java program to print the sum of 20 and 5.
Write a Java program to print the difference of 20 and 5.
Write a Java program to print the product of 20 and 5.
Write a Java program to print the quotient of 20 and 5.
Write a Java program to print the remainder when 17 is divided by 5.
Write a Java program to declare two int variables a = 100 and b = 800 and print a + b.
Write a Java program in a class called Main to display three school-related lines of your choice.
Write a Java program to declare a float variable marks = 45.5f and a double variable avg = 45.5, then print both.
